title: dryas subincisa var. minor
intro: Dryas subincisa var. minor, also known as the alpine dryad or minor dryad, is a small, flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of China and the Himalayas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dryas subincisa var. minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
